insights.anomalies: High alert density (5 alerts in 7 days) with scraper health, velocity burst, and consensus crossing signals suggest automated or suspicious activity. The 'Page not found' errors on long-running education ads indicate broken campaigns still being paid for, requiring investigation.
insights.monthly_trends: Health and education remain dominant verticals, but recent signals show expansion into new networks/verticals and mass launches. The longest-running ads are stale (auto, tech, education) with some showing 'Page not found' errors, indicating a shift from sustained campaigns to high-volume testing.
insights.predicted_opportunities: Prioritize travel (cruise ads appearing) and legal (no-win-no-fee lawyer ads detected), as they show recent momentum despite lower historical volume. Also monitor auto and home improvement, as they have high baseline volume and may see renewed investment.
insights.today_moves: A massive surge of 969 new ads launched in 24 hours, indicating aggressive testing or a coordinated campaign push. This is accompanied by high-risk alerts for scraper health and velocity burst, suggesting automated or high-volume activity that may strain monitoring systems.
insights.weekly_patterns: New ads accelerated dramatically this week (4662 over 7 days), far exceeding the active ad count (275). This shows heavy experimentation with low retention, likely due to rapid testing cycles or short-lived promotional bursts across multiple verticals.
